name: Reuben Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Mayonnaise and a dash of ketchup,
recipeInstructions:
Fat grams per serving: Approx. Cook Time: :12
1. Place sauerkraut in a buttered 1 1/2 casserole dish.
2. Top with corned beef, broken into bits, then cheese.
3. Combine mayonnaise and Thousand Island dressing (or substitute made with mayo, ketchup, and relish) to equal 3/4 cup and spread over cheese.
4. Top with tomatoes or green pepper.
5. Melt butter in microwave and blend with bread crumbs, spreading over top.
6. Cook on HIGH for 12 minutes.
